description_long: This house features a spacious, multi-structure layout with a main building and a detached secondary unit, both surrounded by a fenced yard. The main house has a complex roofline with a mix of gable and flat sections, and multiple large windows that provide ample natural light. The front facade is detailed with a covered porch, arched windows, and a prominent entryway, while the rear includes a patio area and landscaped greenery. The property is enclosed by a dark perimeter fence, and there are visible trees and shrubbery enhancing the residential feel. The secondary structure appears to serve as a guest house or garage, connected by a paved path. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, with a focus on comfort and outdoor space.
description: A large, multi-structure residential house with a complex roofline, fenced yard, and landscaped greenery. Features include a covered porch, arched windows, and a detached secondary unit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, arched windows, and the primary facade details.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated layout, flat and gable roof sections, and the fenced yard with visible landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio area, secondary structure, and additional windows and doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the connection between the main house and the secondary unit, as well as more of the yard and fencing.
attribute_architectural_style: Transitional (mix of traditional and modern elements)
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and arched windows
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent covered porch with steps, arched main door, and decorative columns
